creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
amdmi3      2011-06-13 18:39:00 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/tortoisehg2    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-message 
                         pkg-plist 
    devel/tortoisehg2/files patch-setup.py patch-thg 
  Log:
  TortoiseHg is a Windows shell extension and a series of
  applications for the Mercurial  distributed revision control
  system. It also includes a Gnome/Nautilus extension and
  a CLI wrapper application so the TortoiseHg tools can be
  used on non-Windows platforms.
  
  WWW:    http://tortoisehg.bitbucket.org/
  
  PR:             157067
  Submitted by:   arrowdodger <6yearold@gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.4371    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +76 -0     ports/devel/tortoisehg2/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/devel/tortoisehg2/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +19 -0     ports/devel/tortoisehg2/files/patch-setup.py (new)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/devel/tortoisehg2/files/patch-thg (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/devel/tortoisehg2/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/devel/tortoisehg2/pkg-message (new)
  1.1       +562 -0    ports/devel/tortoisehg2/pkg-plist (new)
